name: get_story
description: Retrieve a single content story by its slug path or numeric ID. Returns the full story object including the nested content tree with all component data, metadata (created/published dates, tags, position), and resolved relations/links if requested. Use the Content Delivery API (cdn/stories) for published content or the Management API (spaces/{space_id}/stories) for draft content.

parameters.name: slug_or_id
parameters.description: The full slug path (e.g., 'blog/my-post') or numeric ID of the story to retrieve.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Your space's access token. Use the preview token for draft content or the public token for published content only.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Content version to retrieve. 'draft' for unpublished changes, 'published' for live content. Defaults to 'published'.

parameters.name: resolve_relations
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of component.field pairs to resolve. Replaces UUIDs with full story objects for relation fields (e.g., 'blog_post.author,blog_post.categories').

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language code for internationalized content (e.g., 'de', 'fr'). Returns translated field values if available.

body.text: Welcome to our blog. This is our first post.
